Blood Ember Breastplate  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 40
STR: +12 DEX: +8 STA: +8 AGI: +8
Effect: Major Shielding (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Blood Ember Breastplate
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 40
STR: +12 DEX: +8 STA: +8 AGI: +8
Effect: Major Shielding (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):50, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:750 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:15000
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 17:45:26
Page Updated:Tue Apr 23rd, 2024

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 15,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
The whole set is good for lowbie SKs
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2004 at 12:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
I like the fact that this isn't 'recomended level'. I have the Blood Ember Gauntlets and they are a nice item for a 25 SK even without the effect. Once the effect kicks in (even though it's a lower level darkness spell) they will be all the more worth the time spent camping them.

...plus they look cool, and it's neat to say 'I'm wearing full Blood Ember gear'.
▲ Page top
RE: The whole set is good for lowbie SKs
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2005 at 8:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761081128
12 posts
/agree.. .

Even after the effect works at lvl 46, this bp becomes +58 AC and +75 hps along with the other stats.

You'd be hard pressed to find a better bp for the value at lvl 46.

this BP is Nice but then its Kinda Sucks Casue effect works lvl 46

# Mar 13 2004 at 5:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1644193099765
86 posts
dont knwo about hos, but stacks with ioS
▲ Page top
RE: Stacking...
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2005 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
Yup, stacks with IoS - doesn't stack with HoS. IoS has completely different stacking rules than HoS.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 26 2003 at 3:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) iksar canot wear plate period
Why Oh Why?
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2003 at 11:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362059541
65 posts
Why Oh Why can't Iksar use this line of armor? All the other SK races can, my brother offered me the blood ember greaves for free, then noticed that Iksar can't use it.... I am a Iksar SK... Verant have a grudge against Iksar or something? This is some of the best SK armor I have ever seen, and the only SK playable class that can't use it is Iksar =(
▲ Page top
RE: Why Oh Why?
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 3:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798113728
1 post
Well, also the Iksar SK's get their own unique Epic, which in my opinion is better than the other races of SK's epic. Just somthing to be thanksful for.
▲ Page top
RE: Why Oh Why?
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2004 at 5:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771596765
49 posts
What unike epic? greenmist? greenmist can be done by almost all races now FYI... only ogres with RZ deity can't do it due to faction issues..
▲ Page top
RE: Why Oh Why?
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2003 at 12:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759409730
View User Forum
174 posts
iksars cannot wear most plate armor because they have a naturally high AC, they can wear just about all quested armor tho - IE: kael/ss plate armor or the new ornate/elemental stuff ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Why Oh Why?
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2003 at 2:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362494735
Scholar
36 posts
Not to be a smartass, but actually it's the other way around. Iksars have that ac bonus because they can't wear plate. They can't wear plate because of RP reasons. They're big cold-blooded scaly lizards, and thus they cannot sweat. If they can't sweat, they have no way to cool themselves down and they'd cook inside a nice suit of platemail in the hot sun.

Edited, Sat Sep 27 15:34:29 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Why Oh Why?
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2003 at 9:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758297215
38 posts
Think about how badass you are, you get a much higher regen, swimming, forrage, vision, nice stats, and you never have to go farther than two zones until you get to 50 if you dont want to. I have an Erudite SK. I was going to make an Iksar SK but you cant do the worker sledgemallet quest =/ . But I did goof around on the iksar SK, and when you slap a Iksar Ceremonial Chestplate on there you are unstoppable. Anyways guess my point is that its kind of a trade off, you have to put up with a lot as an Iksar, but you get it back.
▲ Page top
Not to shabby
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2003 at 10:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757964843
26 posts
Got this dirt cheap on BB for 9K. Had to get a BP cause I turned in Will of Innoruuk for my epic. Man I miss that BP but this one is pretty nice and affordable for what it gives me.

QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2002 at 9:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776622996
View User Forum
44 posts
I am currently buying this BP on the Veeshan server from my friend he is holding it for me until I get the money. I was just wondering if anyone knows about the effect. I really want to know if its stackable with Aegolism or not. I really would love it to be stackable. Any help would be great thank you.

"Whatever waits I have NO regrets!!!"

▲ Page top
RE: Stackable?
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2002 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759409730
View User Forum
174 posts
the effect is an INT caster spell, all get it at lvl 24, and adds about 75hp, 18ac and 14mr. it IS stackable with the cleric line of buffs, and druid, but not with shammy hp buffs
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 1:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779986122
View User Forum
63 posts
Ya, on Tunare server BP runs for about 25k, and leggings is about 14k. That is pretty cheap, I remember like a year ago BE, Cobalt, Tolans, ect were like 80-100k. Shows how good Kunark armor is considered today ;)
▲ Page top
shielding
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2002 at 3:58 PM Rating: Good
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
the Major shielding adds hp+75 ac+18 magic resist+14
thats 58 ac right there, plus the agility bonus.
Too bad some other HP buffs overwrite it. Particularly the shaman's Harnessing of Spirit.


BP runs 40k on Tarew
____________________________
Pain Mistress Okami L`Assundre of Tarew Marr
Dark Elf Shadow Knight
Drinal (Tarew)
Retired after 500 days /played
Deleted
http://eqplayers.station.sony.com/character_profile.vm?characterId=455266869792
Remade
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=96950
Retired again
▲ Page top
RE: shielding
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 4:26 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
Not exactly 58ac; the 18ac from the effect is the actual ac you get from the spell (as in it shows up as 18ac on your persona), whereas the 40ac on the breastplate its self is base ac, and becomes about 60ac when worn, the agility would add about 2 additional ac. This would yield 80ac.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 29 2002 at 1:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hOW CAN SOMETHING THAT SAYS 40 ac BE 60 ac ??? WTF U KNOW WHAT IM SAYING. 1AC = 1AC THEREFORE 40 AC IS EQUAL TO 40AC (THATS 40AC + ZERO AC EQUALS 40AC)
RE: shielding
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2002 at 10:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773477967
View User Forum
353 posts
Shut up asstroll. If your AGI is above a certain point you get bonus AC from items, and 1AC form an item can equal 1.4, 2, or even 3 AC, making 20AC items give anywhere from 20 to 40 AC or more.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2002 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771087234

I will have to try that tonight because I just remembered my beastlord got a spell called inner fire that was a HP/AC buff that did add up the hp to heal until you were full!!!

__DEL__1592757930748

see the word "breastplate" iskars cant wear plate. in game it translates to itching their scaly hides or something. iskars get natural ac bonus tho, if you still dont like it make a darkie
